column5: This section will list all the Tattles of the game, there are plenty that are missable as they are one time encounters or bosses
These will be listed as they become available in each chapter, with a note when additional info is available
Some fights and Tattles are accessible at early points, but not recommended to do until later due to difficulty, these will be under Special Cases

column1: Bowser (1) in his first encounter during the intro in Princess Peach's Castle
Jr. Troopa (1) in his first encounter before getting Goombario
Fuzzipede inside the whale due to being forced to use Watt for the fight (no light, no Tattle)
Kammy Koopa during the final battles, as it is done with Twink and Princess Peach
Can be Tattled, but doesn't count to the RA achievement "Encyclopedia" (8 total)
Goomnut Tree during Goomba King battle
Magikoopa during the first return trip from Shooting Star Summit
Koopa Bros. when they are stacked up
Tubba Blubba when he is chasing you in his invincible state
Lava Piranha (Phase 2), both it and it's buds are already Tattled from Phase 1, still showing the health bar and therefore only count once
Gulpit's Rocks that they can swallow to spit on you for attacks
Anti Guy Squad in Bowser's Castle, not an intended encounter due to its intended difficulty

column2: Note: Available after the first return trip from Shooting Star Summit, when the Magikoopa has been beaten
Note: Available after beating Lee
Note: Available after beating Chan
Note: Available after beating The Master (1)
Note: Available after beating The Master (2)
Note: Available after Chapter 5, has high defence so might be better fought later with Ultra Boots
Note: Can be either Tattled in the first encounter together with Red Goomba, or during the battle with Goomba King
Note: Can be either Tattled in the first encounter together with Blue Goomba, or during the battle with Goomba King
Note: You can Tattle the Koopa Stack, but it does not add to the count. Bring some healing to survive the onslaught during the Tattles.
If you are getting the RA achievements, you can either challenge yourself and try to Tattle them all without items, or you can first clear
the achievement to beat them without items, restart the game when it's unlocked, and do the fight again with items allowed for an easier
time with the Tattles
Note: Optional fight that is skipped by picking "Luigi" during his options, pick one of the other two to fight him
Note: Available during three encounters, each being around when you gather up the stones in the Dry Dry Ruins
Note: Summoned by Tutankoopa
Note: Can be encountered by smashing down a beehive in the forest. Can also be encountered later in Flower Fields
Note: Only during his last battle, when he has reunited with his heart
Note: Jester outfit
Note: Wearing balloons
Note: Camo outfit
Note: Hovercraft with heart on it
Note: Flame outfit
Note: Can be skipped by giving him Lemon Candy, don't do this if you want his Tattle
Note: Some sources say this one can be missable, I cannot confirm this currently. Just Tattle at your earliest convenience to be safe
Note: Do this in Phase 1 specfically, Phase 2 will not be needed as it counts together with this one
Note: Same as the Lava Piranha Phase 1 situation
Note: Summoned by the Lava Buds in phase 2, they can't be summoned if the Buds are stunned or beaten
Note: Can be fought later to match up with going to Chapter 7
Note: Summoned by Super Blooper
Note: Encountered when helping Petunia, only appears in these battles
Note: Summoned by Huff N. Puff when he is hit by attacks
Note: Can be fought after the Kooper switch, by hitting the real companions when they're copied later or in the Crystal Palace
Note: Summoned by Crystal King throughout his fight
Note: Can't be Tattled in the dark areas, must be done later in the castle
